holdings.infoBox: YANG is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily FTSE China Bear 3X ETF (YANG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE China 50 Net Tax USD index. The fund provides daily 3x inverse leveraged exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of the 50 largest Chinese stocks traded in Hong Kong. YANG was launched on Dec 3, 2009 and is issued by Direxion.
infoTable: FTSE China 50 Net Tax USD Index
